title: GravitySword
description: Adds a sword that allows you to flip your gravity in the nether.
body: Adds a single sword, the binary flare. Every enemy kill grants you a charge, for a maximum of 4 charges. Killing a player maxes out your charges. The sword's damage ranges from 5 to 11, depending on the number of charges, and charges can be expended in dimensions with ceilings to flip your gravity upside-down.
